# Auto-generated Documentation

This directory is recreated by `task docs:build`.
Do not edit generated OpenAPI, Swagger UI, or DocFX API metadata files by hand.

## .NET API graph data

`dotnet-api-graph.json` is generated from the DocFX `.NET API` metadata in
`dotnet-api/` by `docs/tools/generate-dotnet-api-graph.cjs` (run via
`task docs:graph`, and automatically as part of `task docs:build`). It powers
the `.NET API` graph view with project, namespace, and type nodes plus
`contains` / `inherits` / `implements` relations.

This file is a generated artifact — **do not edit it by hand**. It is derived
solely from the .NET API documentation and intentionally excludes OpenAPI
endpoints, frontend Storybook data, and hand-authored architecture diagrams.
Regenerate it with `task docs:graph` after the DocFX metadata changes.
